name: Hopeless Fudge Frosting
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small saucepan, combine the butter and milk.
2. Add brown sugar (firmly packed), cocoa, and salt to the saucepan.
3. Cook over medium-high heat until the mixture reaches boiling point.
4. Remove from heat immediately.
5. Gradually beat in powdered sugar using an electric mixer set on high speed until smooth.
6. Add vanilla extract.
7. This frosting is sufficient for a 9 x 13-inch cake or two nine-inch layers.
